strengths: 20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with multiple staff-level technical leadership roles
Founder of sustainable open-source GISCollective platform demonstrating entrepreneurial capability and ability to build products stakeholders depend on long-term
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing emerging engagement with AI tooling and agentic workflows
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML product expertise—current AI infrastructure work exists but no products or platforms built with AI are shown on resume
Education in Computer Science and Fine Arts without AI/ML specialization; lacks Master's or PhD in AI-related field (stated as preferred qualification)
No evidence of strategic advisory experience with customers or partnerships; resume emphasizes engineering execution over AI differentiation strategy or future-state product thinking

key_factors.factor: AI product and strategy expertise gap

response.justification: This candidate has strong technical leadership credentials and 20 years of engineering experience meeting the tenure requirement, with proven ability to execute across diverse technical domains and build sustainable products. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role requires demonstrated expertise in AI-powered products or platforms and strategic advisory capability on AI adoption, neither clearly evident in the resume. While current MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work shows directional interest in AI, it appears infrastructure-focused rather than product or strategy-oriented. The absence of advanced AI education and customer advisory experience further indicates the specialized background this position requires is underdeveloped.
